steps.title: Write the wrap time
steps.content: Each wrap takes $1.6$ minutes, and there are $x$ wraps, so the wrap time is $1.6x$ minutes.

steps.title: Write the bowl time
steps.content: Each bowl takes $2.1$ minutes, and there are $y$ bowls, so the bowl time is $2.1y$ minutes.

steps.title: Set the total time
steps.content: The total preparation time is $50.4$ minutes: $$ 1.6x+2.1y=50.4 $$ The answer is B.
